name: Strawberry Scones
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 425°F. Set strawberries aside.
2. In a large bowl, mix together the flour, sugar, baking powder, and salt.
3. Add butter. Using a pastry blender or two knives, cut in the butter until the mixture resembles coarse crumbs.
4. Stir in the reserved strawberries; toss well to coat.
5. Gradually add milk. With a fork, lightly toss together until the mixture holds together.
6. Gently form the dough into a ball with floured hands. Place on a floured board.
7. Using a floured rolling pin, roll out the dough to a thickness of 1/2 inch.
8. Cut the dough into 2 1/2-inch circles using a floured biscuit cutter. Place on a greased cookie sheet.
9. Bake until golden, about 12 minutes. Serve warm with whipped cream.
